strengths: 19 years of continuous technical experience across software, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains with demonstrated ability to contribute effectively across diverse technology stacks and programming languages
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing recent hands-on engagement with AI platform development and agentic workflows
Proven ability to inspire and teach others through workshops, courses, open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and mentorship at multiple organizations
concerns: No demonstrated leadership or ownership of recognized AI products or platforms built to market—a core requirement for advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption
Experience capped at staff-level IC positions without evidence of director-level strategic partnerships with product and engineering leadership on cloud/AI innovation initiatives
AI expertise is very recent (4-5 months) and infrastructure-focused rather than product strategy, customer advisory, or cloud platform differentiation

key_factors.factor: Long Technical Career with Teaching Ability

response.justification: Bogdan meets the 15-year experience baseline with a strong technical track record across infrastructure, cloud, and now AI domains. However, the director-level principal role requires demonstrated expertise building and shipping recognized AI products, advising strategic customers, and driving cloud/AI platform differentiation. His experience remains at staff-level IC without evidence of the strategic customer partnerships, product leadership, or AI go-to-market success this position demands. Recent AI infrastructure work is a step forward but insufficient to establish the principal-level AI strategy credibility required.
